facebook.caption:
536 reviews. 4 stars. And most tourists walk straight past Suoi Tranh Waterfall to hit the beach instead.

This is Phu Quoc's jungle reset. Cool water, forest canopy, and zero resort pricing at the gate.

If you're spending more than two beach days on the island, add this to the list. It breaks up the routine fast.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Water rushing over rocks, tree cover the whole way in. Suoi Tranh Waterfall earns its 536 reviews. Skip it and you'll regret it on day three of straight beach days.

Jungle, cool water, no resort crowds. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Cool water. Forest canopy. 536 people rated it 4 stars and it's still off most itineraries.
